content.fact: After the Ithor campaign, Ithor’s devastation becomes a galactic moral and ecological wound.
content.injection: Post-Ithor, do not write Ithor as untouched herdship/ecological baseline; carry devastation and blame. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Ithor Devastated.
Respect story-position bounds from Ithor Devastated to Ithor Devastated.
